response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the concluding lyrics and finale of 'Ketsui no Sora e' as provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics; manual transcription and translation were performed for the performer's mid-song and post-performance MC/speech, as well as for the final promotional text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to the vocal performance and speech bursts. Visual text for the birthday announcement is included for the duration of the final static image.

subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dreams just be dreams

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the scenery we haven't seen yet

subtitles.original: もっともっと かがやいて
subtitles.english: Shine more and more

subtitles.original: 高く高く 飛び立とう
subtitles.english: Let's fly higher and higher

subtitles.original: 奇跡さえも越えて
subtitles.english: Even beyond miracles

subtitles.original: みなさん たくさんのコメント ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for all the comments!

subtitles.original: 一つ一つ 重ねてきた
subtitles.english: One by one, we've layered them together

subtitles.original: 未来地図のページを めくるように
subtitles.english: Like turning the pages of a map to the future

subtitles.original: 泣いて泣いて 泣いた夜も
subtitles.english: Even the nights I cried and cried

subtitles.original: 大切な人生の ストーリーだから
subtitles.english: Are part of my precious life story

subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dreams just be dreams

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the scenery we haven't seen yet

subtitles.original: 終わりのない歌を
subtitles.english: An endless song...

subtitles.original: キミにキミにキミへと届け
subtitles.english: ...I send to you, to you, to you

subtitles.original: ずっとずっと 誓うの
subtitles.english: I swear forever and ever

subtitles.original: 決意のソラへ
subtitles.english: To the sky of determination

subtitles.original: 行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go

subtitles.original: 本当に みんなのおかげで 最高の誕生日になりました！
subtitles.english: Truly, thanks to everyone, this was the best birthday ever!

subtitles.original: みんなのこと 大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: I love you all so much!

subtitles.original: 次のライブも 来てね！
subtitles.english: Please come to the next live too!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 告知あり / ときのそら お披露目誕生日 2026
subtitles.english: [Announcement Inside] / Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026
